commit_scope: Make c-bootstrapped fkwu the sole API execution and deployment runtime, constrain Go/Rust/TypeScript to primitive conformance, and bind public observation to the fkwu artifact.

commands: direct fkwu execution of 23 shared endpoint recipes
direct fkwu execution of 10 API-owned endpoint recipes
cd api && ruff check <changed Python files>
local_validation.notes: Direct fkwu returned 42, recursive 55, and [1, 2.5, [3, 4]]. All 23 shared and 10 app-owned endpoint recipes executed directly. The utility/bridge band passed 108/108 and the full non-holdout API suite passed 403/403. Local native-runtime observation verified runtime=fkwu, execution_authority=c-bootstrap-fkwu, result=42, and a content-addressed fkwu binary. The local web/API contract built all 113 pages, passed 86 interface comparisons, and returned no curated failures. Docker execution is the sole local infrastructure gap: no daemon exists at /Users/ursmuff/.docker/run/docker.sock; CI and Hostinger perform the image build.

ci_validation.notes: Exact-head PR checks will build the fkwu image path and run the Windows host floor after push.

deploy_validation.environment: Hostinger production plus GitHub Actions OIDC external observer
deploy_validation.notes: The deploy removes retired kernel-router containers, runs the API image with /app/form/fkwu, reproduces that C binary independently, and records a fkwu-bound WITNESS before public observed=yes can pass.

phase_gate.reason: Local fkwu execution is complete; CI, merge, production roll-forward, authenticated observation, and public verification remain.

evidence_refs: coherence-kernel PR #253 merged exact-decimal round_ndigits into fkwu as f9cb9a382128638931f97ed61734cf7382c8d0dd.
coherence-kernel PR #254 published the corrected consumer distribution pin d6255d6bb52f9431e9af4a74a6a32ea70ad7dcbc.
Immutable consumer commit 64b62db38db2c7cfd85e4f6a4d87eb20282df6a9 contains the fkwu-only public observer bytes and is the OIDC workflow pin.
Direct fkwu round-ndigits band scored 24; the sibling primitive harness reported 1 ok, 0 divergent.
No Go, Rust, TypeScript, flatten, PyO3, preload, or sibling fallback participates in API recipe execution.
Observed:yes remains unavailable until the final consumer merge is deployed and the authenticated public WITNESS matches it.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Every production recipe executes on c-bootstrapped fkwu; sibling kernels can only cross-check named primitive assumptions; public observed=yes is tied to the reproduced fkwu binary and exact deployed merge.
test_flows: build /app/form/fkwu from the pinned submodule C source and execute direct source proofs
independently reproduce and hash fkwu in the OIDC observer
persist a deployed-SHA and fkwu-binary-bound WITNESS
verify_observed_deployment_ask.sh accepts only the exact OBSERVED trust row
